name: BOQ — Cost lifecycle (refresh → validate → snapshot → drift → route)
description: WP-A — one action runs the whole manual cost sequence: reload rules, rebuild the bill from the model, run the cost validators + uncosted/export gate, freeze a snapshot (checksum + server push), drift-check the live bill against the latest snapshot, then route/export the priced bill. Halts on validation failure so a broken or unpriced model never ships.

steps.label: Reload take-off rules + rate provider caches
Rebuild the bill from the model (incremental when the dirty marker is on)
Run the cost validators + uncosted / at-risk rollup (export gate input)
Drift-check the live bill against the latest snapshot
Route / export the priced bill (ERP-ready CSV + P6 XML)
